title: Best Canyons Near Kutaisi: Which One Should You Choose?
excerpt: Compare Martvili and Okatse canyons by scenery, activity level, transfer time, and traveler type.
author: Discover Kutaisi Team
coverImageAlt: Boat ride area in Martvili Canyon

seo.title: Best Canyons Near Kutaisi: Martvili vs Okatse
seo.description: Compare Martvili and Okatse canyons to choose the best day trip from Kutaisi.
seo.ogTitle: Best Canyons Near Kutaisi: Martvili vs Okatse
seo.ogDescription: Compare Martvili and Okatse canyons to choose the best day trip from Kutaisi.

contentBlocks.text: Both Martvili and Okatse canyons are popular day trips from Kutaisi, but they offer different experiences. Choosing the right one depends on your interests and energy level.

items: More relaxed experience with impressive turquoise water.
Optional short boat section depending on conditions.
Great option for families and mixed-age groups.
More active tour with walking and viewpoints.
Famous hanging platforms and dramatic canyon views.
Best for travelers who enjoy light hiking.

contentBlocks.text: Can you combine both in one day?
Yes, many travelers combine both with an early start and private transportation. This works best when road and weather conditions are stable.
